text: (Nasdaq: SLDP), a leading U.S.-based developer of solid-state battery technology, today announced the appointment of Uwe Breitweg, Vice President Powertrain, Emission and Battery Strategy of the BMW Group, to its board of directors, effective July 1, 2026.
Solid Power is developing solid-state battery technology to enable the next generation of batteries for the fast-growing EV and other markets.
